svg.title: Agent Configurability
svg.text: Pick any preset -- New Agent form pre-fills all fields -- No manual configuration needed
Default: Ollama llama3.2 -- all presets editable after creation
CONFIGURATION DIMENSIONS -- 24 PER AGENT, INDEPENDENTLY ADJUSTABLE
Each tool independently toggled per agent
All fields stored in PostgreSQL -- Pydantic v2 validated at API boundary -- LLM params forwarded to create_llm() -- LangGraph agent
